text.message: I'll leave you sheep port for an ore
Aight, an ore for whatever resource I want?
as in I don't have one
Think we need to trade each other cities to stand any chance here guys
Do you get city here, black?
yeah but need to city first
I'll feed you city if you can give me an ore here
Got six sheep. Take whatever you need for city
It's insane, he got all utilities at the beginning
red should buy a lottery ticket lol
Sorry. Don't think I can atm
Ofc he gets the seven lol
pray for a seven, but knowing this guy it'll be an 8
the dice distribution will be insane
